title: hebe obtusata
intro: Hebe obtusata, also known as the "Mountain Hebe," is a shrubby plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Hebe obtusata is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Hebe obtusata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
